arts.ttl: Brighton player ratings vs Chelsea: One 9 and plenty of 8s as superb Seagulls bounce back from horror defeat
arts.sum: Brighton and Hove Albion staged a superb comeback victory to knock Chelsea out of the FA Cup and secure their first home win since November.

arts.ttl: FA Cup talking points: Chelsea's nightmare after Christmas continues
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola enjoyed the 'really good' atmosphere in Manchester City's 2-1 FA Cup fourth round win against Leyton Orient at the Gaughan Group Stadium. Manchester City survived Leyton Orient's scare from the first half to progress into the fifth round - but it came at a cost.

arts.ttl: Chelsea prepare bid for Semenyo - Sunday's gossip
arts.sum: Chelsea prepare bid for Antoine Semenyo, Liverpool monitoring Feyenoord's David Hancko, Barcelona will allow Frenkie de Jong to leave in the summer, plus more.

arts.ttl: Brighton come from behind to beat Chelsea
arts.sum: Brighton come from behind to beat Chelsea 2-1 and progress to the fifth round of the FA Cup.

arts.ttl: Chelsea fans have lots to say about Moises Caicedo after performance vs Brighton, ‘the only player’…
arts.sum: They're all saying the same thing

arts.ttl: Chelsea player ratings vs Brighton: Jadon Sancho disappointing and Christopher Nkunku anonymous
arts.sum: Blues miss out on a fifth round place after disappointing display

arts.ttl: Arsenal and Man Utd in striker transfer blunder as Chelsea prepare €50m bid: FT recap
arts.sum: Plus, Chelsea prepared a bid for a €50 million Premier League star and Antony finally broke his Man Utd curse - at Real Betis . Arsenal and Man Utd in striker transfer blunder as Chelsea prepare €50m bid: FT recap

arts.ttl: Brighton come from behind to knock Chelsea out of FA Cup
arts.sum: Kaoru Mitoma struck the second-half winner on the south coast.

arts.ttl: LIVE: Brighton host Chelsea in all-Premier League FA Cup clash
arts.sum: All the updates from the Amex as Chelsea go with Sancho, Neto and Nkunku in attack

arts.ttl: Barcelona were offered the chance to sign a Chelsea star in January
arts.sum: La Liga giants Barcelona were afforded the opportunity to sign a member of the attacking ranks at Chelsea during the January transfer window. That’s according to Diario Sport, who point…
